steps.title: Find the surprising pattern
steps.content: The setup predicts that host plants benefit from mycorrhizal fungi, while a nonmycorrhizal plant should not benefit and might be harmed. The surprising completion should therefore show a nonhost gaining mass with fungi.

steps.title: Use the species expectations
steps.content: B simply compares two species grown with fungi and does not show surprise. C describes the expected large benefit for a host plant. D misstates the treated-soil comparison because corn was not the highest. The answer is A.
